SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：强攻共鸣时，暴击时额外造成<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力的范围爆炸，冷却{1}秒。非强攻共鸣造成<shuzhi>{2}%</>攻击力的群体治疗
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Deals bonus AoE explosion damage equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK on Crit in Attack Resonance. Cooldown: {1}s. Provides AoE healing equal to <shuzhi>{2}%</> of ATK on Crit in Non-Attack Resonance.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：血量低于{0}%时被攻击获得<shuzhi>{1}%</>生命值点护盾持续<shuzhi>{2}</>秒，冷却{3}秒。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Grants a Shield equal to <shuzhi>{1}%</> of HP for <shuzhi>{2}</>s upon being attacked while below {0}% HP. Cooldown: {3}s.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：暴击值下降10000点，暴击降低{0}%，非暴击伤害提升<shuzhi>{1}%</>
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Reduces Crit Damage by 10,000 and Crit by {0}%, and increases Non-Crit Damage by <shuzhi>{1}%</>.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：暴击时，额外造成本次暴击伤害<shuzhi>{0}倍</>的无视防御的伤害，冷却{1}秒（最高不超过<shuzhi>{2}%</>倍攻击力）
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Deals bonus damage equal to <shuzhi>{0}</> × Crit Damage that ignores DEF on Crit. Cooldown: {1}s. (up to <shuzhi>{2}%</> × ATK)

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：未暴击时，下次攻击必然额外造成一段<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力的暴击伤害，冷却{1}秒
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Deals bonus Crit Damage equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK next time when the attack does not Crit. Cooldown: {1}s.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：攻击时，造成当前充能值*<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力的伤害（最低不低于<shuzhi>{1}%</>攻击力的伤害，不高于<shuzhi>{2}%</>攻击力的伤害)，冷却{3}秒
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Deals damage equal to the current Charge × <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK on attack (no lower than <shuzhi>{1}%</> of ATK or higher than <shuzhi>{2}%</> of ATK). Cooldown: {3}s.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：释放技能时，造成当前充能值*<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力的伤害,且额外造成<shuzhi>{1}</>点破甲，冷却{2}秒

SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Increases damage dealt to Humanoids, Beast, and Machinery by <shuzhi>{0}%</>.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：集群效应Ⅰ:穿戴此装备后新增主动技能-集群效应,使用技能后，以自身为中心造成固定<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力的范围伤害，冷却{1}S。进入战斗状态时进入冷却。本技能元素类型自动匹配释放时的前台武器，不享受武器部分增伤效果。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Cluster Effect I: Equip to unlock the active skill - Cluster Effect. Deals fixed AoE damage equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK, centered on the caster. Enters cooldown when battle begins. Cooldown: {1}s. The skill's element matches the equipped main slot weapon. Does not benefit from partial weapon damage bonuses.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：持续效应Ⅰ:穿戴此装备后新增主动技能-持续效应,使用技能后，对锁定目标造成单体持续伤害，每秒造成<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力点伤害，持续{1}s。冷却{2}S，进入战斗状态时进入冷却。本技能元素类型自动匹配释放时的前台武器，不享受武器部分增伤效果。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Sustained Effect I: Equip to unlock the active skill - Sustained Effect. Inflicts DoT on the locked-on target, dealing damage equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK per second for {1}s. Enters cooldown when battle begins. Cooldown: {2}s. The skill's element matches the equipped main slot weapon. Does not benefit from partial weapon damage bonuses.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：全面防御Ⅰ:穿戴此装备后新增主动技能-全面防御,使用技能后，解除自身异常状态，对队友释放护盾，每人获得<shuzhi>{0}%</>攻击力点护盾，持续{1}S，冷却{2}S。除自己外的生命值百分比最低的队友额外获得{3}%护盾值。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Full Defense I: Equip to unlock the active skill - Full Defense. Removes the caster's debuffs and grants teammates shields equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> ATK for {1}s. Cooldown: {2}s. Grants bonus shield equal to {3}%of ATK to the teammate with the lowest HP percentage.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：定点修复Ⅰ:穿戴此装备后新增主动技能-定点修复,使用技能后，自身提升<shuzhi>{0}%</>生命值点生命值与生命上限，并获得霸体，持续{1}秒，冷却{2}S。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Pinpoint Repair I: Equip to unlock the active skill - Pinpoint Repair. Increases the caster's HP and Max HP by <shuzhi>{0}%</> of HP, and grants Hyperbody for {1}s. Cooldown: {2}s.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：自动覆盖Ⅰ:在当前锁定目标的脚下生成恶意代码，聚集怪物{0}秒后造成<shuzhi>{1}%</>攻击力的范围伤害，冷却{2}秒。本技能元素类型自动匹配释放时的前台武器，不享受武器部分增伤效果。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Auto Override I: Generates malicious code beneath the target, pulling in enemies for {0}s before detonating. Deals AoE damage equal to <shuzhi>{1}%</> of Attack. Cooldown: {2}s. The skill's element matches the equipped main slot weapon. Does not benefit from partial weapon damage bonuses.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：追加损耗Ⅰ:普攻命中目标时，使目标获得一段恶意代码标记，最多叠加{0}段，触发一次<shuzhi>{1}%</>攻击力点单体伤害，并且降低怪物<shuzhi>{2}%</>攻击力。同一单位触发伤害后的{3}秒内，无法再次获得恶意代码印记。本技能元素类型自动匹配释放时的前台武器，不享受武器部分增伤效果
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect – Additional Drain I: Inflicts a stack of malicious code on the target on normal attack hit, up to {0} stacks. Deals damage once equal to <shuzhi>{1}%</> of ATK, reducing enemy's ATK by <shuzhi>{2}%</>. The same target cannot be marked again within {3}s. The skill's element matches the equipped main slot weapon. Does not benefit from partial weapon damage bonuses.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：自身生命值低于{0}%时，受到伤害，掉落治疗球，存在{1}秒，冷却{2}秒，捡取可恢复<shuzhi>{3}%</>攻击力点生命。
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Drops a healing orb upon taking damage when HP falls below {0}%. The orb lasts for {1}s. Cooldown: {2}s. Restores HP equal to <shuzhi>{3}%</> of ATK when picked up.

SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Restores HP equal to <shuzhi>{0}%</> of ATK on hit. Cooldown: {1}s.

SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Has a {0}% chance to increase healing efficiency by <shuzhi>{1}%</> for {2}s. Cooldown: {3}s.

SkillDetail.SourceString: 拓展效果：每{0}秒摇动骰子，相同概率出现3、6、9点。出现3点时玩家伤害降低<shuzhi>{1}%</>，6点时伤害提升<shuzhi>{2}%</>，9点时伤害提升<shuzhi>{3}%</>，这些效果持续{4}秒
SkillDetail.LocalizedString: Expansion Effect: Rolls dice every {0}s, with a one-third chance of landing on 3, 6, or 9. 3: Reduces damage by <shuzhi>{1}%</>; 6: Increases damage by <shuzhi>{2}%</>; 9: Increases damage by <shuzhi>{3}%</>. These effects last for {4}s.
